pois.name: MTR (Mavalli Tiffin Rooms)

menu.description: Semolina steamed cakes, MTR's signature dish
Crispy rice crepe stuffed with spiced potato
Spiced rice-lentil dish with ghee, a Karnataka staple
Deep fried bread with vegetable curry
Traditional Mysore-blend drip coffee with frothy milk
Crispy lentil fritters in tangy lentil soup
Soft, spongy trio of dosas with coconut chutney
Fragrant rice cooked in clarified butter

pois.notes: No reservations. Expect queues 07:00-09:00. Cash and UPI accepted.

pois.name: Toit Taproom

menu.description: Tortilla chips with fresh pico de gallo and sour cream
Tossed in house BBQ or hot sauce
Double patty smash burger with cheddar
Thin crust, fresh basil, San Marzano tomatoes

pois.notes: Craft beer available. Family-friendly. Loud ambience. Great for long layovers.

pois.name: Starbucks

menu.description: Espresso, vanilla syrup, steamed milk, caramel drizzle
Blended ice coffee with flavour shots
Grilled chicken with pesto, served warm

pois.notes: Wi-Fi available with purchase. Power outlets at most seats.

pois.name: Cafe Coffee Day

menu.description: Grilled chicken, lettuce, mayo in a tortilla

pois.notes: Quick grab-and-go. Limited seating.

pois.name: Subway

menu.description: Sliced chicken with choice of sauce

pois.notes: Fully customisable subs. Jain options available on request.

pois.name: Punjab Grill

menu.description: Slow-cooked black lentils in butter and cream
Marinated cottage cheese grilled in tandoor
Aromatic basmati rice with spiced chicken

pois.notes: Pre-security zone. Located in T2 Food Court Level 3. Good for families.

menu.description: Rice, sambar, rasam, 3 curries, papad, pickle, dessert
Tempered yoghurt rice, great for upset stomachs
Rice flour flatbread with onion and coconut

menu.description: Included in lounge fee — Indian and continental spread

pois.notes: Priority Pass, DragonPass accepted. Showers available. Quiet zone section.
